userStories.title: Branch name utility + extend IVcsProvider + GitHub PR creation
userStories.description: Implement the branch name utility function, extend the VCS provider interface with PR creation methods, and implement GitHub provider methods for creating branches and draft pull requests.
acceptanceCriteria: buildBranchName('KODA', 42, 'Fix login redirect bug') returns 'koda/KODA-42/fix-login-redirect-bug'
buildBranchName('PROJ', 1, 'A very long title that exceeds the maximum allowed length for branch names') returns a branch name that is at most 100 characters
buildBranchName('PROJ', 1, 'Special chars: @#$%^&*()') returns a branch name with only alphanumeric characters and hyphens in the slug portion
buildBranchName('PROJ', 1, 'trailing---hyphens---') returns a branch name with no trailing hyphens in the slug portion
IVcsProvider interface includes createPullRequest(CreatePrParams): Promise<VcsPullRequest> method signature
IVcsProvider interface includes getDefaultBranch(): Promise<string> method signature
GitHubProvider.getDefaultBranch() returns the repository's default branch name via GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}
GitHubProvider.createPullRequest() creates a new branch from the repo's default branch HEAD via POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/git/refs
GitHubProvider.createPullRequest() opens a draft PR targeting the default branch via POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls
GitHubProvider.createPullRequest() returns VcsPullRequest with number, url, branchName, state, and draft fields
GitHubProvider.createPullRequest() when branch already exists (HTTP 422 on ref creation) skips branch creation and proceeds to create PR
HttpClient interface includes post() method for GitHub API calls
VcsProviderConfig httpClient includes post() method in factory

userStories.title: Auto-create PR on VERIFIED transition + TicketLink + activity log
userStories.description: Hook into the ticket status transition flow to automatically create a GitHub PR when a ticket transitions to VERIFIED status. Creates TicketLink record and logs VCS_PR_CREATED activity.
acceptanceCriteria: When a ticket transitions to VERIFIED and the project has an active VCS connection, vcsService.createPrForTicket() is called
createPrForTicket() builds branch name via buildBranchName(project.key, ticket.number, ticket.title)
createPrForTicket() builds PR title as '{KEY}-{number}: {ticket.title}'
createPrForTicket() builds PR body from ticket.description (or empty string if null)
createPrForTicket() calls provider.createPullRequest() with draft: true
createPrForTicket() creates TicketLink with url: pr.url, provider: 'github', externalRef: '{owner}/{repo}#{pr.number}'
createPrForTicket() logs TicketActivity with action: 'VCS_PR_CREATED'
ActivityType.VCS_PR_CREATED is added to the ActivityType enum in src/common/enums.ts
When ticket transitions to VERIFIED and project has no VCS connection, no PR creation is attempted
When ticket transitions to VERIFIED and GitHub API returns an error, the ticket transition still succeeds (fire-and-forget)
When ticket transitions to VERIFIED and GitHub API returns an error, a warning is logged with the error details
When ticket transitions to a status other than VERIFIED, no PR creation is attempted
i18n keys 'pr.created' and 'pr.createFailed' exist in apps/api/src/i18n/en/vcs.json and zh/vcs.json

userStories.title: Web ticket detail PR link display + CLI ticket show PR info
userStories.description: Display linked PR information in the web ticket detail page and CLI ticket show command.
acceptanceCriteria: Web ticket detail page shows linked PR as a clickable badge with PR number and status when a TicketLink with provider 'github' and externalRef containing a PR number exists
Web ticket activity timeline shows 'PR created: owner/repo#12' entry for VCS_PR_CREATED activity type
koda ticket show <ref> output includes linked PR URL and external ref in the links section
koda ticket show <ref> --json output includes links[] with PR TicketLink entries
i18n keys for PR-related display strings exist in both apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json and zh.json

analysis:
This is Phase 2 of VCS integration. Phase 1 established the VCS provider interface (IVcsProvider), GitHub provider implementation, VCS connection management, and issue sync. Phase 2 adds automatic PR creation when tickets transition to VERIFIED status.

## Key Files to Modify

### VCS-P2-001 (Branch Name Utility + GitHub PR Creation):
- `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs-provider.ts` — extend IVcsProvider with `createPullRequest()` and `getDefaultBranch()`
- `apps/api/src/vcs/providers/github.provider.ts` — implement new methods using GitHub REST API
- `apps/api/src/vcs/factory.ts` — HTTP client interface only has `get()`, needs `post()` for ref creation and PR creation
- Create `apps/api/src/vcs/utils/branch-name.util.ts` — slugify and build branch name from ticket
- Create `apps/api/src/vcs/utils/branch-name.util.spec.ts` — tests for branch name utility

### VCS-P2-002 (Auto-Create PR on VERIFIED Transition):
- `apps/api/src/common/enums.ts` — add `VCS_PR_CREATED` to ActivityType
- Create `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs-pr.service.ts` — new service for PR creation, TicketLink creation, and activity logging
- `apps/api/src/tickets/state-machine/ticket-transitions.service.ts` — inject VcsPrService, call `createPrForTicket()` after successful `verify()` transition to VERIFIED (fire-and-forget)
- `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs.module.ts` — add VcsPrService to providers and exports
- `apps/api/src/i18n/en/vcs.json` — add prCreated, prCreateFailed i18n keys
- `apps/api/src/i18n/zh/vcs.json` — add Chinese translations

### VCS-P2-003 (Web + CLI Display):
- `apps/web/pages/[project]/tickets/[ref].vue` — add PR link badge in sidebar when TicketLink with provider='github' exists
- `apps/web/components/TicketCard.vue` — may need PR badge if not done in Phase 1
- `apps/cli/src/commands/ticket.ts` — update `show` command to display links section with PR info
- `apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json` — add pr-related i18n keys
- `apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json` — add Chinese translations

## Architecture Decisions

1. **New VcsPrService**: The existing VcsModule exports connection, sync, webhook, and polling services. A new `VcsPrService` is needed for PR creation logic that depends on TicketLinksService (circular dependency risk avoided by keeping it separate).

2. **Fire-and-forget pattern**: Already established via `dispatchStatusChangeWebhook()` in `TicketTransitionsService`. The same pattern applies: catch errors and log, don't block the transition.

3. **HTTP client needs POST**: Current `HttpClient` interface only has `get()`. GitHub API for creating refs uses POST. Need to extend the interface and factory.

4. **Integration point**: `TicketTransitionsService.verify()` calls `executeTransition()` which updates ticket status. After the transaction completes and status change webhook is dispatched, we need to trigger PR creation. The verify method transitions to VERIFIED when ticket is in CREATED state.

5. **Branch already exists handling**: When a ticket is re-verified after being rejected, the branch may already exist. GitHub API returns 422 when ref already exists. Need to catch this and proceed to PR creation.

6. **No VCS connection**: Not all projects have VCS connected. Skip silently per spec.

## Risks
- Circular dependency between VcsModule and TicketLinksModule must be avoided
- HTTP client POST method addition must not break existing GET-only consumers
- The `verify()` method can transition to CLOSED (via VERIFY_FIX route) or VERIFIED — need to only trigger PR for VERIFIED transitions
- Token decryption failures must be caught and logged, not thrown
